framework.name: AuthZEN gap — interface without content
framework.description: AuthZEN only defines the request interface (send a PARC request) but doesn't specify what goes in it. For complex engines like Cedar, OPA, or graphs, governance across federated domains remains unsolved.
framework.raw_quote: AuthZen only defines the interface (send a PARC request...), but it doesn't say what goes in that request.

source.title: IETF Draft: AI Agent Auth & Authz Framework - LinkedIn
